vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #564

plan.title: review-cycle: add stall detection rubric, escalate to user after threshold

narratives.Description: review-cycle: add stall detection rubric, escalate to user after threshold
narratives.Problem: Greptile reviews can stall past the 2-5 min expected window (observed 21 min during the rc4 swarm cascade on PR #561). Step 4 of deft-directive-review-cycle has no rubric for when to escalate to the user, and Phase 6 Step 1 of deft-directive-swarm has the hard gate but no escalation guidance.
narratives.Acceptance: Add a Stall Detection Rubric subsection to Step 4 covering: track startedAt + commit.oid per poll; escalate to user when IN_PROGRESS exceeds 3x expected (~10 min Greptile); reset clock on auto-restart; never auto-retrigger without explicit user approval; document any override in a PR comment. Add a meta/lessons.md entry capturing the 21-min observation.
narratives.OutOfScope: New retrigger mechanics, new service integration, replacing the existing Phase 6 Step 1 hard gate.

items.title: Add Stall Detection Rubric subsection to Step 4 of deft-directive-review-cycle/SKILL.md
Track startedAt and commit.oid per poll; escalate at >3x expected duration (~10 min Greptile)
Detect auto-restart (startedAt changes) and reset elapsed-time clock; notify user
Forbid auto-retrigger (empty commits, comments, force-pushes) without explicit user approval
Document any user-approved override in a brief PR comment for auditability
Add meta/lessons.md entry capturing the rc4 21-min stall observation

references.title: Issue #564: review-cycle: add stall detection rubric, escalate to user after threshold

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.
